deferred.reason: Deferred despite matching display names because the target record is source-backed by brt_bx6_cb12_apr2017 and brt_bx6_south_bronx_sept2016 evidence, which suggests a Bronx CB12 context rather than Manhattan CB12.
Plausible Brooklyn CB11 alias, but this alias/target pair appears in older identity082 review-note context, so it was excluded from this safe post-190 batch.
Shared key and display name are only the initialed form 'A. Albert'; deferred because initial-only people can be same-name traps without stronger source context.

commands: rg/jq inspection of data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch186-prep.json through codex-identity-batch192-prep.json for touched entity ids and traps
jq inspection of data/identity-overrides/merges.json and data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json
bun --eval read-only duplicate identity mining over readCanonicalRecords() and identityKeysForRecord() for canonical entity records
bun --eval final guard/evidence check for selected alias/target pairs
